allow: PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":8000\\s"\).ForEach\({ \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] }\) | Sort-Object -Unique; $pids | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match '^\\d+$'\) { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $_" } })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\valen\\Desktop\\Cven amenazas"; Remove-Item -Force ".\\startup.log",".\\startup_err.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m", "uvicorn", "app.main:app", "--host", "127.0.0.1", "--port", "8000" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput ".\\startup.log" -RedirectStandardError ".\\startup_err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $proc.HasExited)
